# State of Britain

> Open data on Britain's public services, economy, and society. All datasets sourced from official UK government statistics, licensed under the Open Government Licence v3.0.

The State of Britain data API provides machine-readable JSON datasets covering public spending, healthcare, housing, energy, education, transport, justice, defence, immigration, local government, and more.

## API

- [API Index](https://stateofbritain.uk/api/index.json): Full list of available datasets with descriptions, sources, and download URLs.
- [Data Catalog](https://stateofbritain.uk/api/data/catalog.json): Searchable catalog with tags, summaries, and series-level metadata for all 50+ datasets.

All datasets follow the `sob-dataset-v1` schema with consistent structure: metadata, snapshot values, and time series data.

## Key Datasets

- [Public Spending](https://stateofbritain.uk/api/data/spending.json): TME, receipts, borrowing, debt, departmental breakdown (1978-2030)
- [Borrowing & Debt](https://stateofbritain.uk/api/data/borrowing.json): Gilt yields, monthly borrowing, debt interest, debt/GDP
- [Taxation](https://stateofbritain.uk/api/data/taxation.json): Tax receipts by type, tax burden, international comparison, tax gap
- [NHS Waiting Times](https://stateofbritain.uk/api/data/nhs-waiting.json): RTT waiting times, A&E performance (2012-2026)
- [Health Outcomes](https://stateofbritain.uk/api/data/health-outcomes.json): Life expectancy, cancer survival, avoidable mortality
- [Housing Supply](https://stateofbritain.uk/api/data/housing-supply.json): Net additional dwellings, completions by tenure
- [Housing Stock](https://stateofbritain.uk/api/data/housing-stock.json): Dwelling stock by age, type, tenure, EPC ratings
- [Energy](https://stateofbritain.uk/api/data/energy.json): UK primary energy composition by fuel type (1990-2024)
- [Jobs & Employment](https://stateofbritain.uk/api/data/jobs.json): Employment, unemployment, inactivity, earnings
- [Productivity](https://stateofbritain.uk/api/data/productivity.json): Output per hour, sector breakdown, OECD comparison
- [Education](https://stateofbritain.uk/api/data/education.json): Per-pupil spending, GCSE/A-level, PISA scores
- [Immigration](https://stateofbritain.uk/api/data/immigration.json): Net migration, asylum applications, population projections
- [Defence](https://stateofbritain.uk/api/data/defence.json): Spending (% GDP), personnel, equipment
- [Local Authority Spending](https://stateofbritain.uk/api/data/local-gov-spending.json): 218 councils across UK, spending by service area
- [Mayoral Authority Spending](https://stateofbritain.uk/api/data/mayoral-spending.json): 12 combined authorities and GLA, spending and funding sources
- [Local Government Finance](https://stateofbritain.uk/api/data/local-government.json): Council tax, funding mix, Section 114 notices

## Attribution

Contains public sector information licensed under the Open Government Licence v3.0.
